seo.home_description: Experts in industrial control equipment repair, mobile device maintenance, and warranty management.

home.hero_title: If you can imagine it, we can develop it
home.hero_subtitle: We take care of your operation
home.hero_description: When you least expect it, your equipment fails and you don't have a service policy to cover it. Let us introduce ourselves by putting our experience in industrial control equipment repair at your service.
home.partners_subtitle: We have alliances with leading technology brands
home.partners_description: We have dedicated ourselves to maintaining close relationships with the leading brands that solve our customers' problems. We believe in collaboration for the development of technological projects.

services.title: Our Services

list.repair: Repair, maintenance, and backup of mobile devices (handheld terminals, mobile printers, and rugged laptops).
list.monitoring: Management and monitoring of your devices.
list.warranty: Warranty administration for your equipment, among other managed services.

services.training_description: We have qualified personnel to offer training courses (Printers, Terminals, and Software).
services.installation_description: We offer installation services for your equipment, whether it's ID card printers, label printers, readers, terminals, or applications. For new equipment purchased from us within the Metropolitan Area, installation is on us.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Have the first contact with our highly trained staff
contact.address_value: Rio Papaloapan #308, Col. Mexico, Monterrey, N.L CP64710
